posts.author: vijaykumarmahto
posts.text: Revenue growth of other jewellery companies in Q1: Titan Jewellery: 40% Kalyan Jewellers: 38% Senco Gold: 60% At first glance Gargi’s Q1 growth of 11.6 percent appears comparatively weak. But that’s not the case. The large part of the growth of Tanisq, Kalyan and Senco was due to inflation in gold prices/inventory gains. Their actual growth could be somewhere between 7-12 percent. Unlike Titan,Kalyan or Senco, PNGS Gargi sells everyday use fashion jewellery, Sterling silver jewellery, 9KT gold jewellery, 14KT diamond jewellery, Gifting articles and therefore only a small part of its business b…

posts.author: P2018
posts.text: Will have to wait for management to give some more color. Other jewellery companies are more occassion based + gold driven (maybe). Management did flag Q3 and Q4 are better periods.

posts.author: Anuj2
posts.text: Isn’t this growth way too slow compared to other jewellery companies or am I reading it incorrectly ?

posts.author: P2018
posts.text: https://www.bseindia.com/stockinfo/AnnPdfOpen.aspx?Pname=d402554c-cf7d-48a7-ae23-e23dc4fc167f.pdf Grew by 11% given that it’s a slow quarter they will have to do a lot of heavy lifting in the balance quarters
